prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在80名左右，学校层次稳固；2025年声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业 无人报考）；2026年声誉仍偏负面（涉及学术不端事件）；抖音热度一般（总排名第77位），短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未见明显报考关注升温信号；管理科 学与工程为A级学科（第五轮评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科；工科整体实力较强，车辆工程、机械工程等传统优势专业在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校工科特色高度契合；江苏省2026年物理类考生估算约37.96万人，较2025年26.06万人大幅增加约45.7%， 竞争显著加剧；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，与江苏省地理邻近，跨省报考偏好较强；该校在江苏省招生规模较大（2025年 物理类243人），对江苏考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划小幅扩招（+2.88%）、江苏省考生大幅增加（约+45.7%）、学校声誉偏负面等因素，考 生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应远超扩招缓解效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所前移；预测最低位次约32246名，区间31746–32746名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 24250 → 28088 → 24194 → 29982 → 32190, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 8000 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 32190; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 254, 254, 256, 251, and 243 respectively, showing a slight decreasing trend; the 2026 plan is 250, an increase of 7 (+2.88%) compared to 2025, and the slight expansion slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking around 80 in recent years, indicating a solid school level; reputation was somewhat negative in 2025 (popular majors' admission scores plummeted, some majors had no applicants); reputation remained somewhat negative in 2026 (involving academic misconduct incidents); Douyin popularity is average (ranked 77th overall), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no clear signal of increased application attention; Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university; overall engineering strength is strong, with traditional advantageous majors like Vehicle Engineering and Mechanical Engineering highly recognized in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended due to high social popularity, closely matching the university's engineering characteristics; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province for 2026 is about 379,600, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 260,600 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, geographically close to Jiangsu Province, with a strong cross-province application preference; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Jiangsu Province (243 in Physics Category in 2025), maintaining continuous appeal to Jiangsu examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (+2.88%), the significant increase in Jiangsu Province examinees (approximately +45.7%), and the somewhat negative school reputation, the intensified competition effect from the surge in examinees far outweighs the easing effect of the expansion, so the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to move forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32246, with a range of 31746–32746.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 31746–32746, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<31746), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering Innovation Experimental Class, and other flagship programs; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>32746), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and strive to enter the university.
